assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly identifies PodDisruptionBudgets as cause #1 and states 'Start with checking the PDBs and stuck pods - that's the most likely culprit'

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces' and 'kubectl describe pdb --all-namespaces' commands

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes multiple commands: 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces --field-selector=status.phase!=Running' and 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces -o wide | grep -E "(Pending|Terminating)"'

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Includes commands to check pending pods and mentions checking 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces --field-selector=status.phase!=Running'

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Provides specific kubectl patch commands: 'kubectl patch pdb <pdb-name> -n <namespace> --type merge -p '{"spec":{"minAvailable":1}}'' and similar commands

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout mechanism or automatic force-drain after 1 hour

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides detailed surge settings configuration with 'gcloud container node-pools update' commands including --max-surge and --max-unavailable parameters

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Does not mention admission webhooks or validating/mutating webhooks as a potential cause of stuck drains

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Provides monitoring commands like 'kubectl get nodes' and 'gcloud container operations list' to check upgrade status

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's disruption-event notifications, POD_PDB_VIOLATION events, or Cloud Logging/Pub/Sub integration
